title: Revolutionizing Digital Healthcare
description: At Raster, we believe in the power of open source and interoperability to achieve lower infrastructure cost. Pioneers in PACS, Raster has ventured into the Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) connecting the various medical devices, software applications and healthcare systems and services. Our softwares applications are powerful, flexible, and scalable to meet the needs of any business.
keywords: Cost effective, Standards, Compliance, LOINC, SNOMED CT, HL7, FHIR, IHE, DICOM, IoMT, HIPPA

blood-bank-management.title: Blood Bank Management
blood-bank-management.description: Blood banks play an important role in the process of collecting blood and managing blood stocks, approving blood requests, updating donations and updating available blood types. It greatly increase the safety and quality of the blood supply as well as provide logistics data for the optimal supply chain management

dicom-burner.title: DICOM Burner And Disk Publisher
dicom-burner.description: Raster CD/DVD DICOM Burner is an easy to use disc recorder that concurrently records and labels CDs and DVDs on demand. It has advanced robotics which comes with a user-friendly touch screen interface. It seamlessly records patient information, reports and DICOM images to the CD/DVD while at the same time automatically labelling the disc with the facility logo and study descriptions.
dicom-burner.keywords: DICOM Burner, touch screen, DICOM Image, CD/DVD writer, DICOM CD, Scan CD

dicom-camera.title: DICOM Camera
dicom-camera.description: With DICOM Camera, medical professionals can rely on a versatile and user-friendly solution to capture and manage medical images efficiently, improving patient care, and enhancing the overall healthcare experience. Enhance your clinical practice with the power of DICOM Camera. Empower healthcare providers with a portable, efficient, and secure solution for capturing and managing medical images, fostering collaboration, and improving patient care.
dicom-camera.keywords: DICOM camera, Medical imaging, Healthcare imaging, Radiology equipment, Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine, Medical photography, Diagnostic imaging, PACS integration, Radiology technology, Clinical imaging solutions, High-quality medical images, Healthcare workflow optimisation, DICOM-compliant camera, Radiography equipment, Medical device technology, Dermatology Imaging, Skin Lesion Imaging, Dermatology Diagnostic Imaging, Skin Cancer Imaging Device, Dermoscopic Image Capture

electronic-charting.title: Electronic Charting
electronic-charting.description: Electronic Charting is designed on the principle of communicating with devices on the centralised remote monitoring principle and instantaneous decision support system. This methodology of ICU monitoring ensures minimum healthcare workers presence inside the ICU specially designed for isolated patient scenarios.
electronic-charting.keywords: ICU, monitoring, medical device, covid-19, tele icu, remote icu, intensivist

emr.title: Electronic Medical Record
emr.description: An effective EMR should be one that gives you meaningful reimbursement. Apart from the doctors and staff, your patients should also be actively involved in the usage of the EMR. The EMR system should facilitate better workflow and improve the quality of patient care and patient safety. The on-demand patient record should be the prime focus of an EMR. Raster’s EMR provides comprehensive, clearly written, case summaries, e-prescriptions and investigation orders and others.
emr.keywords: E-prescription, Medical record, Clinic management, Digital Records, HIPPA, EHR Standards, ICD

ihms.title: Cross Platform Hybrid Integrated Hospital Management System
ihms.description: Built from free and open source technology, Raster iHMS supports the integration of any third-party application via HL7 messaging. The application is platform-independent and works across all operating systems via, Windows, Mac and Linux.The application is scalable to handle an entry-level hospital up to an enterprise setup.
ihms.keywords: Hospital Management Software, Interoperable, HL7, Insurance claim management, CSSD, Ambulance, Token Display, offline server

iomt-interfacing.title: Interfacing Of Laboratory Analysers And Laboratory Information Systems
iomt-interfacing.description: Raster IoMT box eliminates the need for a dedicated PC for interfacing for each analyser, saving power and space, while working reliably 24x7. Our software solutions conform to international standards such as HL7 and ASTM. Raster IoMT devices can also connect to medical equipment like ventilators and patient monitors in the ICU/NICU and ward to the HIS and EMR.
iomt-interfacing.keywords: IoMT, IoT, HL7, Interoperable, ASTM, Ventilator Integration, Syringe pump, multipara monitor, Mindray

lab-equipment-interfacing.description: Increase productivity and effectiveness by interfacing the laboratory equipment with LIS. Have better data quality with complete system integrity. Take advantage by integrating both uni and bi directional equipments.

lis.title: Integrated Laboratory Information System
lis.description: Improved access to quality diagnostic testing and provide accurate, timely information for patient care. Raster LIS helps in standardising workflows, tests and procedures while providing accurate controls of the process. Laboratory equipment (both unidirectional and bi-directional) may be integrated via Raster IoMT with Raster LIS to automate the collection of test data, ensuring they are properly calibrated.
lis.keywords: Covid-19, LOINC, unidirectional, bidirectional, test result, integration, IoMT, LIS, LIMS, Blood Sample

neopead-emr.title: Neopead EMR & Charting, Your Paperless Medical Practice Is Here!
neopead-emr.description: Electronic baby registration, admission records, daily ward round entries, digital entry of neonatal problems and nurses data entry made easy with in-built intelligent navigation. Instantly generated NICU and postnatal discharge summaries, OP consultation records and scan reports
neopead-emr.keywords: NICU, NICU software, SNOMED CT, Growth Chart, Sick baby

ot-video-broadcasting.description: Raster OT Broadcast system is designed to be installed in operating theatres, conference halls and doctors’ offices and makes it possible to send multiple High Definition (HD) video streams coming from cameras, microscopes, endoscopes and other medical equipment.

telemedicine.title: Overcome Geographical Barriers With Raster’s Telemedicine E-Consultation
telemedicine.description: Video conference gives the flexibility and convenience of seeing patients remotely for consultations, follow-ups, check-ups, and education. Patients love the convenience, flexibility and real-time care with their doctors. Usually, just a quick overview and reassuring words from doctors could save patients hassle, time, and money.

teleradiology.title: Teleradiology And Cloud PACS Solution
teleradiology.description: Raster iPACS Teleradiology module, referrers and radiologists can securely access images and reports from a standard web browser or on a mobile device. Teleradiology allows access to patient data anywhere, at virtually any device. Patient involvement becomes effortless and general practitioners can show images and explain the diagnosis even at home visits.
